text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text: Oh, goodness. Baku, could you spare a second?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Certainly! What's up? I do need to head over to
the teachers' office soon, though.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
Even better, then! Could you demonstrate that
one breathing exercise? The Victory V? Ready...
go!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Huh-what?! I'm not really following, but I've got
your back! *Inhale*...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
Great! That's the Baku I know. You sounded really
dark and gloomy a minute ago.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
But remember what we learned in the Victory
Club? When things look bad, just breathe and do
your Victory V!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, now that you mention it! I do feel a lot
better about my odds now!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'm confident that I can turn in a good apology
for accidentally Bakushin bursting through a
closed door.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text: Oh no... If only I'd spotted you earlier...
